grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites Part 1, 5.14.1 for lease term and Part 1, 5.5.1–5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly states need to check 'lender's Part 2 requirements' and 'lender's Part 2 minimum lease term'

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Only mentions 'no reasonable prospect of enforcement' generally but does not specify the 4-year/10-year enforcement thresholds

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Specifically mentions 'indemnity insurance if appropriate and acceptable to the lender' as a potential solution

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides specific Handbook section references, distinguishes Part 1 vs Part 2 requirements, and offers handbook-specific procedures
